info.description:
Backend for the Astir family streaming platform: auth, parent/child profiles with permissions, content catalog, subscriptions & payments (Click), and signed streaming URLs.

**Localization:** pass `?lang=uz|ru|en` (or `Accept-Language`) on any catalog/billing endpoint to receive resolved strings instead of the raw i18n map. Tag names, titles, and descriptions are all resolved. See `docs/i18n-localization.md` for the full spec.

**Streaming grants:** `GET /stream/{id}/grant` returns `duration_sec` (full video length), `preview_only`, and `preview_until_sec` (15 s for non-subscribers). Display `duration_sec` in the player timeline; enforce `preview_until_sec` client-side — the server hard-blocks segments beyond that point regardless.
info.title: Astir Streaming API

get.description: Returns all saved cards platform-wide. Optionally filter by user_id. Token hash is included for fingerprinting; the raw token is never exposed.
Returns all FAQs including inactive ones, with full I18n maps for editing.

post.summary: Create a FAQ entry

[Admin] List messages in a support chat

parameters.description: Return messages older than this message ID
parameters.name: before

parameters.description: Return messages newer than this message ID
parameters.name: after

post.summary: [Admin] Reply in a support chat (with optional attachment up to 50 MB)
[Admin] Mark a support chat as read on the admin side

post.description: Accepts an Apple identity token from ASAuthorizationAppleIDCredential. Verifies the token with Apple's public keys, then finds or creates a parent account and returns a token pair. The user's name (given_name, family_name) is only provided by Apple on the very first sign-in — pass empty strings on subsequent calls.
post.summary: Sign in with Apple (iOS)

post.description:
Single endpoint for the parent QR scanner. The backend detects the code type automatically.
- Pairing code (from /auth/child/init): child_id is required; links the device and optionally sets initial permissions.
- Extension code (from /children/{id}/extend/init): child_id is ignored; grants 2 more hours of watch time.
The response field "action" tells the client which case was handled.
post.summary: Parent scans a child QR — handles both device pairing and session extension

parameters.description: Scanned code. child_id required only for pairing.
parameters.name: body

post.description: The child's device calls this first. Display the returned QR on the child's screen. The parent scans it and calls POST /auth/child/confirm to select which child profile this device belongs to. Poll GET /auth/child/{device_id}/status until status=confirmed.
post.summary: Child device initiates pairing — returns a QR the parent scans

get.description: Returns status=pending until the parent confirms. Once confirmed, includes access_token and child profile so the device can start streaming.
get.summary: Child device polls for pairing confirmation

post.description: Same as /auth/otp/request but semantically for password reset. Follow up with /auth/otp/verify then /auth/reset-password.
post.summary: Start password-reset flow (sends OTP to email)

post.description: Accepts a Google ID token obtained from the Google Sign-In SDK on Android or iOS. Verifies the token with Google, then finds or creates a parent account and returns a token pair. On first sign-in the account is created automatically — no separate registration step needed.
post.summary: Sign in with Google (Android / iOS)

post.description: Exchange parent or staff email+password for an access/refresh token pair.
post.summary: Log in with email and password
Log out (revoke refresh token)
Upload a profile avatar image

post.description: Called when VerifyOTP returned user_exists=true. Validates the password and returns tokens.
post.summary: Complete login after OTP verify (existing users)

post.description: Starts the parent auth flow. In dev (OTP_DEFAULT_CODE set), the code is echoed back in debug_code and no email is sent.
post.summary: Request an OTP code sent to an email address

post.description: Verifies the OTP. If user_exists=true the response already contains access_token + refresh_token — the user is logged in. If user_exists=false proceed to POST /auth/register with last_name, name and password.
post.summary: Verify OTP code
Refresh an access token

post.description: Called when VerifyOTP returned user_exists=false. Creates the account with name (required), last_name (optional), and password, then returns tokens.
post.summary: Register a new parent account after OTP verify

post.description: Call after /auth/forgot-password → /auth/otp/verify. Uses the verified OTP session stored in Redis.
post.summary: Set a new password after OTP verify

post.description: Authenticated parent calls this after scanning the TV's QR code. Links the TV to the parent's account. Returns the profile list ("who's watching?").
post.summary: TV: parent confirms pairing by scanning QR

post.description: TV calls this on first launch. Displays the returned QR on screen. Parent scans it with their authenticated app (/auth/tv/confirm). TV then polls /auth/tv/:device_id/status until confirmed.
post.summary: TV: generate pairing QR

post.description: TV calls this with its device_token (tv audience). Pass child_id to stream as a child; omit (or null) to stream as the parent. Returns a short-lived streaming access_token.
post.summary: TV: select who is watching

get.description: TV calls this with its device_token to refresh the list of available profiles without re-selecting.
TV polls this after displaying the QR. Returns status "pending" until parent confirms. Once confirmed, returns a device_token and profile list.

post.description: Calls Click's POST /card_token/payment. No user redirect needed — the charge is silent. The card must have been verified via POST /payments/click/card/verify first.
post.summary: Charge a verified card token (recurring / subscription renewal)

post.description: Creates a pending subscription + transaction and returns the provider checkout URL. Redirect the user to `checkout_url`. In dev (no Click secrets), the URL points at the mock endpoint.
post.summary: Start a subscription checkout

post.description: Creates a pending subscription + transaction and returns a Click deeplink URL. Open the URL on the device — the Click app intercepts it, or the browser payment page opens as fallback.
post.summary: Start a deeplink / hosted-page checkout

post.description: Only brand + masked PAN + provider token are stored; raw PAN is never persisted. Works with the Click dev stub today — wire production to the provider's frontend tokenisation.
post.summary: Tokenise and save a card
Set a card as default

parameters.description: Resolve i18n fields to this locale
parameters.name: lang

post.description: Alternative to PIN entry. The child's device shows this QR; the parent scans it and calls POST /auth/child/extend/confirm to grant 2 more hours.
post.summary: Child initiates QR-based extension — returns a QR the parent scans

post.description: Called by the child's device when the watch window expires. Requires a PIN previously set by the parent.
post.summary: Child enters PIN to extend watch session by 2 hours

get.description: Returns "pending" until the parent scans the QR. Once confirmed, returns "confirmed" with extends_until.

get.summary: List permissions applied to a child

post.description: Rules target a category OR a specific content item. Time windows are minutes-of-day; WeekdayMask is a 7-bit field (Mon=bit0..Sun=bit6, 127=every day).
post.summary: Attach an allow/deny rule to a child

put.summary: Update a child's permission rule in real time

put.description: The PIN lets the child self-extend their watch session by 2 hours without needing a parent scan.
put.summary: Set or replace the 4-digit PIN for a child (parent)

get.description: Returns a unified list where each item has `item_type`: "content" (stream directly) or "series" (tap → GET /series/:id/episodes). Non-admin requests exclude individual episodes. Use `?kind=` to filter: "film" | "cartoon" | "other" returns only matching content; "series" returns only series cards. Omit `kind` to get everything. Pass `?lang=uz|ru|en` (or Accept-Language) for localized strings.

get.description: Validates the HMAC signature + re-evaluates live parent rules on every request, so parents can revoke access in real time. Shared links without a valid (viewer, exp, sig) trio are rejected.

post.description: Calls Click's POST /card_token/request. Click sends an SMS OTP to the phone linked to the card. Stores a pending (unverified) card and returns its ID. Follow up with POST /payments/click/card/verify.
post.summary: Step 1 — request a Click card token

post.description: Calls Click's POST /card_token/verify. On success the card is marked verified and ready for recurring charges.
post.summary: Step 2 — verify card token with SMS OTP

get.description: Only available when CLICK_SECRET_KEY is empty. Flips a pending checkout to succeeded so you can test subscription activation without a real gateway.
get.summary: DEV ONLY — mark a pending Click transaction as paid

delete.description: Calls Click's DELETE /payment/reversal. Only payments from the current reporting month can be reversed. Also marks the local transaction as refunded.

get.description: Call this right before playback. The server checks the caller's subscription (or, for a child token, parent subscription + allow/deny rules) and returns a short-lived signed URL bound to the viewer's id. Hand the URL to your <video> tag or HLS player.

put.summary: Save playback progress for a stream

get.description: Returns messages ordered ascending by time. Use `after` to poll for new messages, or `before` to load older history.
get.summary: List messages in the current user's support chat

parameters.description: Return messages older than this message ID

parameters.description: Return messages newer than this message ID (use for polling)

get.description: Parent lists all TV devices linked to their account.

post.summary: Create an admin or super_admin (super_admin only)

get.summary: Get a user by ID (super_admin only)

put.summary: Update a user's profile and role (super_admin only)

get.description: Returns all saved cards belonging to the given user. Token hash included; raw token never exposed.
get.summary: List cards for a specific user (admin)

post.description: Cancels the user's current active/pending subscriptions and creates a fresh active one for the given plan. Logs a manual succeeded transaction with amount 0 for auditing.
post.summary: Assign a plan to a user (super_admin)

weekday_mask.description: Weekday bitmap: bit0=Mon ... bit6=Sun. 127 = every day.

views_count.description:
ViewsCount is incremented atomically each time a stream grant is issued.
It counts grant events (play button presses), not individual HLS segments.

domain.Role.description: super_admin=platform owner, admin=content staff, parent=paying customer.

kind.description:
Kind controls how the client groups and displays episodes.
Defaults to "episodes" so existing rows keep working after migration.

spic.description:
Fiscalization fields — required by Uzbekistan law for every paid transaction.
SPIC is the 17-character ИКПУ commodity classification code.
PackageCode identifies the unit-of-measure package from the national catalog.
VATPercent is the НДС rate (0, 12, or 15); VAT is calculated inclusive of price.

token_hash.description: SHA-256 fingerprint — NOT the raw token

family_name.description: FamilyName is the user's last name. Same first-sign-in-only restriction.

given_name.description:
GivenName is the user's first name. Apple only provides this on the very
first sign-in; pass an empty string on subsequent sign-ins.

identity_token.description: IdentityToken is the raw identityToken string from ASAuthorizationAppleIDCredential.

handler.ErrorResponse.description: Error body returned by any failing endpoint.

id_token.description: IDToken is the raw id_token string from Google Sign-In on Android or iOS.

debug_code.description: DebugCode is only set when OTP_DEFAULT_CODE is non-empty (dev mode).

url.description: signed media URL for this variant playlist

action.description:
Action is "pairing" when a new device was linked, "extension" when a
2-hour watch extension was granted.

duration_sec.description:
DurationSec is the full content duration in seconds, regardless of
whether this is a preview grant. Clients should display this in the
progress bar so users see the real length even when access is limited.

is_hls.description:
IsHLS is true when MediaURL points at an HLS master playlist. Players
can use this to decide whether to hand the URL to hls.js vs a plain
<video src>.

preview_only.description:
PreviewOnly is true when the caller has no active subscription.
Players must stop playback at PreviewUntilSec seconds.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer {access_token}" (access tokens are issued by /auth/login and /auth/refresh).
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
